notes: Cropped and enlarged the supplied Atlas wordmark for substantially stronger visual presence.
Increased the five left-rail map icons by 20 percent and added more vertical spacing.
Enhanced active map glow with a layered halo, white label, luminous underline and restrained motion.
Reduced both top-navigation columns by approximately 30 percent.
Moved the far-right column after the Command Centre Map and visible-items typography.
Added a fine horizontal rule and breathing room around the left-rail column divider.
Preserved labelled wax mappings, existing functionality, mobile navigation and reduced-motion support.
